destinations.name: Paris, France
destinations.description: The City of Light is renowned for its art, cuisine, fashion, and romantic atmosphere. Home to iconic landmarks like the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame Cathedral.
destinations.climate: Temperate, mild winters, moderate summers. Best visited April-May or September-October.
destinations.cuisine: French bistro dining, pastries, wine, cheese

destinations.name: Tokyo, Japan
destinations.description: A vibrant metropolis blending traditional culture with cutting-edge technology. Experience ancient temples, bustling markets, and world-class cuisine.
destinations.climate: Humid subtropical. Best visited March-May or September-November.

destinations.name: Barcelona, Spain
destinations.description: A Mediterranean city famous for its Gaudí architecture, vibrant culture, and beautiful beaches. Perfect blend of historic charm and modern energy.
destinations.climate: Mediterranean. Warm summers, mild winters. Best visited April-May or September-October.

destinations.name: New York City, USA
destinations.description: The city that never sleeps offers world-class museums, Broadway shows, fine dining, and iconic landmarks. Experience the energy of urban life at its peak.
destinations.climate: Humid continental. Best visited April-May or September-November.
destinations.cuisine: Diverse international cuisines, bagels, pizza, steaks

destinations.name: Bali, Indonesia
destinations.description: A tropical paradise with lush rice terraces, ancient temples, pristine beaches, and spiritual culture. Affordable and accessible for travelers seeking relaxation and adventure.
destinations.climate: Tropical. Warm year-round. Best visited April-October (dry season).
destinations.cuisine: Indonesian cuisine, satay, nasi goreng, fresh tropical fruits

hotels.name: Le Marais Luxury Apartments
hotels.description: Charming hotel in the historic Marais district with elegant rooms and close proximity to museums and galleries.
hotels.review_highlight: Excellent location in Marais, friendly staff, beautiful decor

hotels.name: Budget Paris Hostel
hotels.description: Clean and friendly hostel perfect for backpackers and solo travelers. Social atmosphere with bar and common areas.
hotels.review_highlight: Great value for money, friendly atmosphere, central location

hotels.name: Tokyo Shibuya Premium Hotel
hotels.description: 5-star hotel in Shibuya with stunning views, excellent Japanese cuisine, and world-class service.
hotels.review_highlight: Impeccable service, great food, perfect Shibuya location

hotels.name: Ubud Garden Villa
hotels.description: Beautiful villa resort surrounded by rice terraces and gardens. Perfect for relaxation and nature immersion.
hotels.review_highlight: Stunning views, peaceful atmosphere, excellent spa services

hotels.name: Gothic Quarter Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: Intimate hotel in the heart of Gothic Quarter with unique architectural charm and personal service.
hotels.review_highlight: Perfect location in Gothic Quarter, charming rooms, excellent breakfast

flights.description: Direct transatlantic service from NYC to Paris. Multiple daily departures.
Nonstop service to Tokyo. Premium in-flight service included.
Short-haul European flight. Budget and full-service options available.
Quick regional flight to popular tropical destination.

experiences.title: Seine River Dinner Cruise
experiences.description: Romantic evening cruise on the Seine with gourmet dinner and live music. Perfect for couples.

experiences.title: Traditional Tea Ceremony Experience
experiences.description: Learn the art of Japanese tea ceremony from a master. Includes practice and traditional sweets.

experiences.title: Sagrada Familia Guided Tour
experiences.description: Expert-guided tour of Gaudí's masterpiece. Learn about architecture, history, and symbolism.

experiences.title: Sunrise Hike on Mount Batur
experiences.description: Pre-dawn trek to see sunrise from an active volcano. Includes breakfast and guide.

experiences.title: Balinese Cooking Class
experiences.description: Learn to prepare authentic Balinese dishes from a local chef. Includes market visit and meal.
